entries.title: Dobby warning on Harry’s twelfth birthday

content.fact: On Harry’s twelfth birthday, Dobby warns him not to return to Hogwarts and causes a magical incident that brings a Ministry warning.
content.injection: On Harry’s twelfth birthday, Dobby warns him not to return to Hogwarts and causes a magical incident that brings a Ministry warning.

entries.title: Harry first hears the basilisk voice

entries.title: Rogue Bludger match and Colin petrified
